mapper.sql: id, building_id, building_name, room_id, room_name, alert_email, threshold, total, remain, status, deleted, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET building_id = #{buildingId}, building_name = #{buildingName}, room_id = #{roomId}, room_name = #{roomName}, alert_email = #{alertEmail}, threshold = #{threshold}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE room SET total = #{total}, remain = #{remain}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM room WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM room WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY status DESC, building_name ASC, room_name ASC
